name: Weather Comparison
description: Research and compare current weather in Tokyo, New York, and London

tasks.name: Gather Current Weather Data
tasks.description: Use web search to find current weather in Tokyo, New York, and London
tasks.success_criteria: Retrieve current temperature for each city

tasks.name: Extract and Compare Temperatures
tasks.description: Extract temperatures from previous task and compare them
tasks.success_criteria: Determine which city is warmest and which is coldest

tasks.name: Summarize Weather Comparison
tasks.description: Create a summary of the weather comparison
tasks.success_criteria: Generate a summary stating the warmest and coldest cities

tasks.name: Save Weather Summary
tasks.description: Save the weather comparison summary to a file
tasks.success_criteria: Weather summary saved to a file
